summary: Phase 1 Security Features Testing Complete. Tested: Stripe CMS (admin-only), Moderator role permissions, Audit log, Forgot password flow, 2FA (TOTP), Reactivate auction. Fixed 3 backend endpoints that incorrectly used require_admin instead of require_admin_or_moderator for read-only access. 33/35 backend tests passed, 2 skipped (expected). All frontend UI elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/stripe/public-config correctly returns {mode, publishable_key, enabled} - secrets never exposed
GET /api/admin/stripe returns masked secrets (sk_t...2345 format) + boolean flags for has_secret_*
PUT /api/admin/stripe validates key prefixes (sk_test_, sk_live_, pk_test_, pk_live_) - rejects invalid
Empty secret field in PUT preserves existing value (write-only pattern)
Audit log entries for stripe.update contain only field NAMES, never values
POST /api/webhooks/stripe returns {ok:false, reason:webhook_secret_not_configured} when no secret
Moderator role correctly has read-only access to settings, stats, users, audit-log, pending, auctions
Moderator correctly denied access to PUT /admin/settings (403), GET/PUT /admin/stripe (403), ban/unban users (403)
Moderator CAN delete comments via DELETE /admin/comments/{id}
Forgot password returns generic message for both existing and non-existing emails (no enumeration)
Reset password validates code, marks used=true, rejects reuse
2FA confirm with valid TOTP activates and returns 8 backup codes (8-char uppercase hex)
Login with 2FA enabled returns {requires_2fa:true, challenge_token} - no JWT until verified
2FA verify accepts TOTP (6 digits) or backup code (8 chars)
Reactivate auction flips sold→live, clears finalized_at, sets new ends_at
seed_data_creation: Created moderator user via PUT /api/admin/users/{id} with role='moderator'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 security features fully tested. 2FA was enabled/disabled during testing - admin account currently has 2FA disabled. Moderator account created: moderator@test.bg / mod12345. Stripe CMS has test keys configured (pk_test_FAKE_EXAMPLE_12345, sk_test_FAKE_EXAMPLE_SECRET_12345). Audit log has entries for stripe.update, comment.delete, auction.reactivate. The BMW M2 Club sport spec auction was reactivated during testing and is now 'live' status.

backend_stripe_cms: GET /api/admin/stripe - admin only, returns masked secrets + booleans
PUT /api/admin/stripe - validates key prefixes (sk_test_, sk_live_, pk_test_, pk_live_)
PUT /api/admin/stripe - empty secret preserves existing value
Mode toggle changes which publishable_key is returned by /public-config
Audit entry created with action=stripe.update, details contains only field NAMES
backend_audit_log: Entries created for: settings.update, stripe.update, comment.delete, auction.reactivate
backend_forgot_password: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns generic ok message (no user enumeration)
POST /api/auth/reset-password validates code, rejects wrong code
backend_2fa: POST /api/auth/2fa/confirm with correct TOTP activates + returns 8 backup_codes
frontend_admin_stripe: 6 input fields (pub test/live, secret test/live, webhook test/live)
Masked current values visible when set
frontend_moderator_access: Moderator sees limited tabs (no Stripe, no Settings)

bugs_fixed_during_testing: GET /api/admin/pending was using require_admin instead of require_admin_or_moderator - FIXED
GET /api/admin/auctions was using require_admin instead of require_admin_or_moderator - FIXED
GET /api/admin/auctions/{id} was using require_admin instead of require_admin_or_moderator - FIXED
GET /api/admin/sold was using require_admin instead of require_admin_or_moderator - FIXED

mocked_apis.stripe_preauth: mock_pi_* tokens used for payment pre-authorization (unchanged)
mocked_apis.resend_email: Falls back to console log if no API key - OTP codes logged to backend console
mocked_apis.twilio_sms: Falls back to console log if no credentials
